title: L-man's Better Apples
description: Expands on Minecraft's apple by introducing new variants and more foods to craft.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/082dae311b203a9556d21faefa9985556c93b872.png)

Minecraft has tons of food with wasted potential, this mod aims to fix apples

Firstly, adding a new villager known as "The Orchardists" which sells you all the knew apples.
The villagers job block is the all "Apple Crate". A wooden storage crate that has 6 item slots.

A full video here!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fmOHC_ZxtMk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**NEW APPLES**
_All are sold by Orchardists_
- Cortland
- Pink Lady
- Granny Smith
- Jonagold
- McIntosh
- Red Delicious

**NEW APPLE PRODUCTS** _can be crafted using ANY apple (including the defult vanilla one)_
- Apple Juice
- Apple Slices
- Apple Core
- Apple Pie
- Carmel Apples
